## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Lovable and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website improvements, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented a refined content strategy with 7 priority clusters, targeting non-branded traffic and the vibe coding category](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Template library project progressing well; design mockups and prototypes shared](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Website structure and CMS issues discussed; GrowthX to propose a solution for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Access to Lovable's code repository needed to proceed with implementations](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [7 priority content clusters identified: best apps/tools, website definitions/explainers, website inspiration, competitive comparisons, business/app ideas, resources for solopreneurs, app alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Strategy aims to target organic searchers and expand into adjacent search queries](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Focus on both informational and commercial content to capture users at different journey stages](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [38 initial content assignments selected for review, with plans to expand based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Template Library Progress

  - [Prototype shared showing community-generated content integration](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Design mockups being iterated to align with Lovable's branding](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [GrowthX team includes experienced designers (e.g., former Grammarly head of design)](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Website Structure and CMS Challenges

  - [Current website lacks consistent approach; blog system described as "janky"](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Discussion on using /blog vs. creating a new section (e.g., /guide)](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Considerations for long-term scalability and separation of company announcements from educational content](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose a simple, single-column layout to start publishing quickly](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

### Competitive Content Development

  - [Building product feature matrix for accurate comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Plans for extensive competitive content (e.g., Lovable vs. Bold)](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### Technical Access and Implementation

  - [Need access to Lovable's code repository to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Clarification needed on .dev vs .app domain usage](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Discussion on potential consolidation of domains for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to gain access to Lovable's code repository (Sebastian to provide)](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Rachel to connect GrowthX with Lovable's design team for branding alignment](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose website structure and content organization solution](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Continue developing competitive content and product feature matrix](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement simple, single-column layout for initial content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Team to review and approve content assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/5AxpSryhJxXpY4YJgCLXDVgwzGcSwE4P?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
